scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const p=require('path');const f=require('fs');const r=require('fs/promises');const root=__dirname;(async()=>{const copyFromRoot=async(name)=>{const candidates=[p.join(root,'node_modules',name),p.join(root,'..','node_modules',name)];for(const c of candidates){if(f.existsSync(c)){const dst=p.join(root,'dist','node_modules',name);await r.cp(c,dst,{recursive:true,force:true});return;}}throw new Error('Cannot find '+name+' in node_modules');};await copyFromRoot('nodemailer');await copyFromRoot('jose');const docsSrc=p.join(root,'docs');const docsDst=p.join(root,'dist','docs');await r.cp(docsSrc,docsDst,{recursive:true,force:true});})()
